decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures, utilizing a combination of efficient creatures and powerful enablers like Earthbender Ascension and Erode to maintain board control. The deck also includes some versatile creatures like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Surrak, Elusive Hunter to provide additional value. The mana base is designed to ensure a smooth curve and access to the necessary colors. Overall, the strategy revolves around building a wide board presence and applying constant pressure to force the opponent into a defensive position.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using aggressive red creatures and spells. By using efficient creatures like Burnout Bashtronaut and Howlsquad Heavy, coupled with burn spells like Shock and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, continuous damage. Cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Hexing Squelcher provide support and disruption, while finishing off the opponent with powerful creatures like Nova Hellkite and Zhao, the Moon Slayer. The key strategy is to maintain a relentless assault and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through card draw, removal, and countering opponent's spells. It utilizes a mix of spells and creatures to maintain board presence while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The key strategy revolves around generating card advantage through drawing, filtering, and recycling cards, while also having access to removal and counterspells to handle threats. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently managing resources and maintaining control of the game until it can secure a win condition.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly overwhelm and outpace your opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and powerful instant spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off, you can apply pressure and control the board early on. The deck also includes some card draw and mana fixing to ensure consistency in your plays. With a focus on tempo and efficiency, you can quickly build a strong board presence and control the pace of the game to secure victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through spells that allow for card advantage, removal, and counterspells. It aims to maintain board control while drawing cards efficiently and using powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation and Gran-Gran. The main strategy involves setting up a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan with removal and counters. The deck also includes some utility cards like Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up to ensure consistent card draw and resource management. Overall, the deck seeks to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in a long game.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board of aggressive green creatures to overwhelm the opponent. It includes spells and creatures that provide mana acceleration, evasion, and buffs to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes cards that can provide card advantage and disruption to control strategies. The goal is to establish a strong board presence early in the game and secure a quick victory before the opponent can stabilize or mount a defense.

The main theme of this deck is utilizing powerful green aggro creatures and abilities to overwhelm the opponent quickly. With a focus on low mana cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and efficient spells like Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to establish board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game. Cards like Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional boosts to creatures, while cards like Fabled Passage and Esper Origins offer flexibility and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to be fast, aggressive, and efficient in its offense.

The main idea of this deck is to use a combination of cards to quickly reanimate powerful creatures and overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Requiting Hex and Doomsday Excruciator, the deck aims to fill up the graveyard with creatures to be revived later. Deadly Cover-Up and Strategic Betrayal provide protection and disruption against the opponent's strategy, while cards like Duress help to control the opponent's hand. Overall, the deck focuses on quickly establishing a strong board presence through reanimation and controlling the game to come out on top.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a fast and aggressive board presence using a mix of efficient creatures and powerful spells. By incorporating a wide range of low-cost creatures like Iron-Shield Elf and Marauding Mako, combined with combat tricks such as Moonshadow and Practiced Offense, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly. Additionally, the inclusion of powerful finishers like Carnage, Crimson Chaos and Cecil, Dark Knight provide additional threats to close out the game. The mana base supports a smooth curve and consistent access to all necessary colors of mana.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with low-cost creatures and utilizing cards that provide evasion or protection. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a consistent stream of threats while maintaining card advantage through draw spells. The deck includes a mix of flying creatures, card draw, and versatile removal spells to control the game and secure victory. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy while ensuring consistency in casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to win through efficient creature combat and card advantage.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful creature presence on the battlefield. By utilizing cards like Ambitious Augmenter and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, the deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and apply pressure on the opponent. Cards like Practiced Offense and Erode help to push through damage and finish off the opponent efficiently. The deck also includes a mix of creatures and spells to maintain a steady flow of threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on being aggressive and overwhelming the opponent with a fast and efficient Mono Green Aggro strategy. It utilizes cards that provide ramp, mana fixing, and buffing effects to quickly build a strong board presence. The deck includes cards that can provide card advantage, evasion, and removal to ensure that the opponent's defenses are broken down quickly. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game to secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to utilize tempo plays, evasion, and burn spells to quickly pressure the opponent and maintain board control. Cards like Boomerang Basics, Bounce Off, and Secret Identity provide disruptive elements, while Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off offer evasive threats. Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent help deal damage to the opponent directly, with Multiversal Passage providing mana fixing. Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Riverpyre Verge ensure consistent card draw and land drops, while Colorstorm Stallion can assist in finishing off the opponent. Roaring Furnace / Steaming Sauna serve as versatile removal options.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures, backed up by various support cards such as Practiced Offense and Seam Rip. The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and applying pressure to the opponent, utilizing cards like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Brightglass Gearhulk to push for damage. The inclusion of cards like Llanowar Elves and Multiversal Passage help to ramp up and fix mana, ensuring a smooth curve of threats to maintain the aggression throughout the game.

The main concept of this mono green aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of cheap creatures and powerful pump spells, utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to ramp into bigger threats like Mossborn Hydra and Demolition Field. The deck also has some evasion and protection with cards like Escape Tunnel and Snakeskin Veil, while also including some cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Esper Origins to provide additional value and flexibility in combat. It aims to hit hard and fast, keeping the pressure on the opponent until victory is achieved.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of efficient creatures and spells that can deal damage rapidly. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early on using cards like Badgermole Cub and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, while utilizing cards like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip to clear any potential blockers. The addition of Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam allows for versatile plays and adaptability in different situations. Overall, this deck aims to pressure the opponent aggressively and maintain control of the battlefield throughout the game.
